heading: Establishment
label: 9523 Establishment
notes: References in TextSection ___101, referred to in subsec. (a)(2), probably means , which is classified to .section 100101 of Pub. L. 117–58section 9511 of this titleSection ___114, referred to in subsecs. (a)(3) and (b), probably means , which is classified to .section 100114 of Pub. L. 117–58section 9524 of this title

children.text: that shall be known as the MBDA Business Center Program;
that shall be separate and distinct from the efforts of the Under Secretary under section ___101; and1So in original. See References in Text note below.1

under which the Under Secretary shall make Federal assistance awards to eligible entities to operate MBDA Business Centers, which shall, in accordance with section ___114, provide technical assistance and business development services, or specialty services, to minority business enterprises.1

children.heading: Coverage
children.label: b Coverage
children.text: The Under Secretary shall take all necessary actions to ensure that the MBDA Business Center Program, in accordance with section ___114, offers the services described in subsection (a)(3) in all regions of the United States.1
